name: Functional - Create Ticket via API Endpoint
description: Validates that a user can create a ServiceNow ticket by sending a properly formatted message to the /agent/message endpoint.
input: POST /agent/message with user_message: 'Please create a ticket. short description: Printer not working, category: Hardware, priority: High'
output: AgentResponse with success=True and response containing confirmation of ticket creation
success_criteria: No error or error_type fields present
